_meta.description: Shareholding-pattern history (long format) for listed SAHIs from Screener — Investors / Shareholding Pattern. Drives Governance → Ownership Trend. Multi-company; filter by company_id.
_meta.classification_note: Classifications might have changed from Sep 2022 onwards. The new XBRL format added more details to the shareholding pattern from that point on.
_meta.expanded_investor_rows_note: Screener exposes individual entity names when a shareholding line-item is clicked, but those expanded rows require an authenticated session + interactive expansion. Group-level rows only; no investor-level data invented.
_meta.notes: Built from the staged Screener source-of-record (offline); live scrape unavailable in this environment.
